creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
poudriere log (incomplete, of course):

```
[00:03:31] ===>   py39-poetry-1.5.0 depends on package: py39-cachecontrol>=0.12.9<0.13 - not found
[00:03:31] *** Error code 1
```

I think it is a bit difficult to match the specific version required by python projects, at least when using the ports tree because when using a tool like pip it resolves to the specific version (even if there is a new version).

This respects what the project requires, but is difficult to match using the ports.

```
# rg 'cachecontrol = \{ version' devel/py-poetry/work-py39/poetry-1.5.0/pyproject.toml
39:cachecontrol = { version = "^0.12.9", extras = ["filecache"] }
```

```
# rg DISTVERSION= www/py-cachecontrol/Makefile
2:DISTVERSION=  0.13.1
```

Currently, devel/py-poetry cannot be installed using `pkg(8)`.
